categories.name: Polymer Film Composition & Form Factor
reference_questions: What is the chemical composition of the flexible polymer substrate — is it PET, PEN, PI, or another polymer? Provide the material grade and supplier.
What is the substrate thickness (µm) and the minimum bend radius (mm) without cracking or delamination?
What is the glass transition temperature (°C) and elastic modulus (GPa) of the polymer substrate?
Does the CTE of the polymer film match the LCD panel substrate? Provide CTE values (ppm/°C) for both.
What are the overall dimensions (width × height × total thickness in mm) of the heater film as delivered?

categories.name: Heating Element Geometry & Resistivity
reference_questions: What material is the heating element — ITO, silver nanowires, carbon nanotube film, metal mesh, or etched metal foil? Provide the material specification.
What is the sheet resistivity (Ω/sq) of the heating element at 20°C, and how does it vary across the operating temperature range?
What is the heating element track width (µm), spacing (µm), and pattern geometry — serpentine, grid, or other? Provide a drawing.
What is the maximum power density (W/m²) the element delivers without damaging the polymer substrate or adhesive?
What is the temperature coefficient of resistance (TCR, ppm/°C) and how is this used in the control circuit?

categories.name: Film Bonding & Interface Method
reference_questions: Is the adhesive pre-applied to the heater film (PSA liner), applied wet at assembly (LOCA), or an optical bonding gel? Describe the assembly sequence.
What is the adhesive thickness (µm), peel strength (N/25mm), and operating temperature range of the bonding layer?
What surface preparation is required on the LCD side before bonding — cleaning, plasma treatment, primer?
Does the bonding layer introduce optical distortion? Provide haze % and refractive index of the adhesive.
How are electrical connections made to the heater film — solder tabs, conductive adhesive, flex cable connector? Provide a layout drawing.

categories.name: Thermal Activation & Operating Range
reference_questions: At what ambient or surface temperature (°C) does the heater activate? Is this a fixed threshold or dew-point controlled?
What is the maximum continuous operating surface temperature (°C) the heater maintains?
What is the thermal response time — seconds from activation to reaching the target surface temperature at worst-case ambient?
Is heater control proportional (PID), bang-bang (on/off), or open-loop? Provide the control algorithm.
What sensor type (NTC thermistor, PT100, dew-point sensor) triggers activation and where is it located?

categories.name: Environmental Qualification & Operating Range
reference_questions: What environmental qualification standards must the heater film meet — MIL-STD-810, DO-160, IEC 60068, EN 50155?
What is the operating temperature range (min to max °C) and storage temperature range for each deployment environment?
What humidity, condensation, and frost test conditions must the heater survive? Provide the required clearance time (seconds).
What vibration and shock profile must the bonded assembly withstand without delamination?
What dielectric strength (V/mm) and insulation resistance (MΩ) are required between the heater element and the LCD surface?
